title: クレーンゲームに挑戦！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, while I'm out and about with Mejiro
Ryan...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She stops and stares at a claw machine.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
choice_data_list: You want one of those plushies?
You want one of those plushies?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Well... It reminds me of a scene from this book I
read.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
There's a girl who's trying to get a plushie, but
she's not having any success...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Then her boyfriend shows up, gets the plushie
easily, and gives it to her!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I've always wanted something like that to happen
to me!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
...Geez, wh-what am I talking about? Please
forget I said anything, haha!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Um... If you'd get one for me, any of them would
be fine.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: There's no way I can fail now!
